sentence: A useful theory does more than explain what has already happened; it also helps us ask better questions about what may happen next.
reference: 一个有用的理论不仅能解释已经发生的事情，还能帮助我们针对接下来可能发生的事情提出更好的问题。
deductions: 没有译出分号后的递进关系
把 may 误译成必然

sentence: The value of disagreement lies partly in its ability to reveal assumptions that would otherwise remain unnoticed.
reference: 分歧的价值，部分在于它能够揭示那些原本不会被注意到的假设。
deductions: lie in 译为位于而非在于
